TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cirarokohay Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Cirarokohay a niyaro', 213 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 575 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 71% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 408 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 29% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 167 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 68%, Rukai 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: ʦiraro~uko~uħaj itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiraro~uko~uħaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: Cirarokohay Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Cirarokohay a niyaro', 213 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 575 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 71% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 408 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 29% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 167 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 68%, Rukai 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: ʦiraro~uko~uħaj itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiraro~uko~uħaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
